properties.remark: ITD REPORTS A CLOSURE OF INTERSTATE 15 FROM EXIT 118 BROADWAY STREET IN IDAHO FALLS TO EXIT 143 NEAR ROBERTS DUE TO SIGNIFICANT REDUCTIONS IN VISIBILITY CAUSED BY BLOWING DUST. TIME IS APPROXIMATE.

UPDATE TO PREVIOUS TORNADO REPORT BASED ON NWS STORM SURVEY: TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AROUND 1:15PM. NUMEROUS LARGE TREE LIMBS WERE FOUND DOWNED ALONG HUSTON ROAD. MINOR DAMAGE TO A GARAGE, AN OVERTURNED CAMPER, AN UPROOTED TREE, AND ADDITIONAL LARGE TREE LIMBS WERE FOUND ON PRIVATE PROPERTY ON HUSTON ROAD. VIDEO SHOWED THE TORNADO NEAR LESLIE BUTTE, ALTHOUGH IT MAY HAVE LIFTED TEMPORARILY IN THIS AREA. BARBED WIRE FENCING AND LARGE FENCE POSTS WERE FOUND RIPPED OUT OF THE GROUND ABOUT A MILE AND A HALF EAST OF DARLINGTON. VIDEO SHOWS THE TORNADO LIFTING AROUND 1:38 PM. FINAL RATING FOR THIS TORNADO IS A HIGH-END EF0 WITH WIND SPEEDS OF 75 TO 85 MPH. THE TORNADO IS ESTIMATED TO HAVE BEEN 250 FEET WIDE AND POTENTIALLY 7 MILES LONG.

UPDATE TO PREVIOUS TORNADO REPORT BASED ON NWS STORM SURVEY: TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AROUND 1:15PM. NUMEROUS LARGE TREE LIMBS WERE FOUND DOWNED ALONG HUSTON ROAD. MINOR DAMAGE TO A GARAGE, AN OVERTURNED CAMPER, AN UPROOTED TREE, AND ADDITIONAL LARGE TREE LIMBS WERE FOUND ON PRIVATE PROPERTY ON HUSTON ROAD. VIDEO SHOWED THE TORNADO NEAR LESLIE BUTTE, ALTHOUGH IT MAY HAVE LIFTED TEMPORARILY IN THIS AREA. BARBED WIRE FENCING AND LARGE FENCE POSTS WERE FOUND RIPPED OUT OF THE GROUND ABOUT A MILE AND A HALF EAST OF DARLINGTON. VIDEO SHOWS THE TORNADO LIFTING AROUND 1:38 PM. FINAL RATING FOR THIS TORNADO IS A HIGH-END EF0 WITH WIND SPEEDS OF 75 TO 85 MPH. THE TORNADO IS ESTIMATED TO HAVE BEEN 250 FEET WIDE AND POTENTIALLY 7 MILES LONG. THE DURATION OF THE TORNADO EVENT WAS 23 MINUTES.

PUBLIC REPORT OF WIND DAMAGE, POSSIBLE THUNDERSTORM RELATED. REPORT OF MULTIPLE TREES DOWN OR DAMAGED, ONE TREE FELL ON A VEHICLE NEAR HEISE HOT SPRINGS CAMPGROUND. A LARGE WILLOW TRE WAS SPLIT IN HALF. THE CALLER ESTIMATED THE DAMAGE OCCURRED AROND 11 PM TO MIDNIGHT. THERE WAS AN IDAHO TRANSPORTATION DEPARTMENT SITE RIVER RIM ITD, THAT REPORTED A GUST TO 64 MPH AT 1245 AM, LOCATED ABOUT 20 MILES TO THE NE.

INTERSTATE 15 WAS CLOSED EARLIER ON FRIDAY BETWEEN EXITS 118 AND 150 FOR APPROXIMATELY TWO HOURS DUE TO BLOWING DUST AND LOW VISIBILITY. THE INTERSTATE RE-OPENED TO TRAFFIC SHORTLY AFTER 400 PM MDT. START AND END TIMES OF CLOSURE ARE APPROXIMATE.
